---
title: "Multiparadigm programming in Lua language"
author:
  - name: Peter Čimo
date: "2009-01-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "IIT.SRC: 5th Proceedings in Informatics and Information Technologies"
  publisher: "STU in Bratislava FIIT"
---
